master_prompt: A breathtaking cinematic wide establishing shot in a sweeping vertical dive and high-angle aerial view, revealing an endless, multi-layered organic metropolis inside a human brain. Deep parallax and monumental verticality create dizzying architectural vertigo across hundreds of stacked floors, connected by soaring suspension bridges, art deco railway hubs, and translucent sap-pipe conduits. The image is rendered in a prestige 2D animated feature film aesthetic with hand-drawn line-over-paint warmth, reminiscent of classic European illustrated storybooks and traditional line art, layered over deep painted backgrounds with volumetric lighting that strictly avoids glossy 3D CG, polygonal modeling, or plastic rendering. The atmospheric illumination is rooted in a profound nocturnal palette where the deep background sky and structural abyss are saturated in Night of Córtex dark blue (#090C18), completely stripped of ambient green so that green functions purely as data. Cold, punctual bioluminescence defines the city's nervous system: electric trails of Cyan-Impulse (#5EE6FF) race like shooting stars along sweeping neural-route highways, while established elevated roads gleam in smooth Myelin bone-white (#ECE9F4). Far below, an ancient lower highway echoes with the subtle grid pattern of notebook paper. In the distance, the towering Prefrontal Hall skyscraper rises under construction, clad in organic scaffolding with bright Work-yellow (#D9B23C) warning banners and crane lights. Along the perimeter walls, subtle pulses of Otto-pink (#FF7BA6) trace protective tribal frontiers, while the distant horizon glows with a warm Dopa-amber (#FFC65A) climate of anticipation. Precise, isolated botanical accents of Astri-mint green (#7CF2C8) glow on mechanical repair nodes, keeping the object accents sharp and free from any sickly Cortisol acid-green (#B7F05A) fog. The living architecture merges biological wonder with clean urban engineering without any gore, visceral slime, body horror, or teeth. Any visible inhabitants appear only as minuscule, silhouette-scale pedestrians on vast overpasses, preserving the awe and nocturnal mystery of a child discovering a secret, luminous civilization humming in the dark.
negative_prompt: glossy 3D CG, plastic render, generic 3D look, Unreal Engine render, Octane render, CGI, 3D modeling, polygonal modeling, ambient green bioluminescence, green background sky, rainbow decorative palette, gore, viscera, body horror, teeth, blood, exposed flesh, biological horror, readable text, written words, logo, watermark, signature, UI elements, mascot cuteness, chibi, big eyes, adorable cartoon characters, prominent foreground characters, realistic human organs, anatomical gore, flat 2D style, vector art, daytime lighting, bright sunny sky
failure_checklist: Glossy 3D / Plastic CG Render: The image looks like a standard 3D polygonal render (Unreal/Octane/streamer aesthetic) instead of displaying tactile 2D line-and-paint warmth over painted backgrounds.

Ambient Green Bioluminescence: The general city lighting or night sky is washed in green light instead of adhering strictly to the Night of Córtex blue (#090C18) base with cyan (#5EE6FF) and bone-white (#ECE9F4) signal lighting.

Missing Verticality / Flatness: The composition lacks vertical depth, parallax, and stacked floors, looking like a flat horizontal layout rather than a dizzying metropolis seen in a deep vertical dive.

Finished Prefrontal Skyscraper: The central high-rise (Prefrontal Hall) appears as a fully completed, polished glass skyscraper rather than an unfinished structure covered in organic scaffolding, construction cranes, and Work-yellow (#D9B23C) signage.
Body Horror / Visceral Gore: The organic architecture features realistic guts, raw flesh, blood, slime, or anatomical teeth, violating the clean, family-friendly (10-13) architectural design.
Prominent Mascot Characters: Large foreground characters, cute mascots with big eyes, or readable cell-type nametags appear in the frame, shifting the focus away from the wide establishing city art.

Unmapped or Decorative Colors: Colors are scattered randomly like a decorative rainbow without semantic meaning, failing to isolate Astri-mint (#7CF2C8) to specific repair accents or Dopa-amber (#FFC65A) to distant horizon climate.
Readable Text or Logos: The render contains legible signage, English/Portuguese words, logos, or watermarks anywhere on the buildings, banners, or highways.
why_this_composition: This wide high-angle dive establishes Córtex City's core visual identity by contrasting hand-drawn line-and-paint warmth against deep 3D background parallax, immediately communicating the scale of a living civilization without falling into generic glossy CG. Structuring the metropolis around vertical strata—from the unfinished Prefrontal scaffolding at the top down to the notebook-grid lower highways—visibly embeds Léo's ongoing maturation and neuroplasticity into the architecture itself. By strictly reserving cyan and bone-white for electrical signal infrastructure and banishing ambient green, the composition turns color into an intuitive visual language where every hue signals a precise biological function.
